name: Mercy & Futa Widowmaker - Medical Examination (GONE SEXUAL)
description:
FUTANARI.

(widowmaker is futa, mercy is female.)

After being captured by Overwatch, Widowmaker was taken in for interrogation. Mercy steps in, demanding to see Widowmaker and run tests and examinations, to see if she can save Amélie. She gets her wish, but something seems off, almost as if Widowmaker wanted to be captured...

creators notes:

im not too too happy with this one tbh, hopefully it doesnt do too bad. im not opposed to reworking this one tho, that being said. sometimes the bot would act as if widowmaker is surprised by things, even tho spoiler: she actually did want to be captured and planned this all out. but i figured maybe people using proxies could fare a bit better.

i tried to keep it "in lore" to some degree. also copied over some of the descriptions from my previous bots, but changed things around where needed obv.
